Name.description: The user-supplied name of the cluster. This identifier is a unique key that identifies a cluster.

Status.description: The status of the cluster. For example, Available, Updating, Creating.

PendingUpdates.description: A group of settings that are currently being applied.

Resharding.description: The status of an online resharding operation.

SlotMigration.description: The status of the online resharding slot migration

ProgressPercentage.description: The percentage of the slot migration that is complete.

ACLs.description: A list of ACLs associated with the cluster that are being updated

ACLToApply.description: A list of ACLs pending to be applied.

ServiceUpdates.description: A list of service updates being applied to the cluster

MultiRegionClusterName.description: The name of the multi-Region cluster that this cluster belongs to.

NumberOfShards.description: The number of shards in the cluster

Shards.description: A list of shards that are members of the cluster.

AvailabilityMode.description: Indicates if the cluster has a Multi-AZ configuration (multiaz) or not (singleaz).

Port.description: The port number that the engine is listening on.

Engine.description: The name of the engine used by the cluster.

EngineVersion.description: The Redis OSS engine version used by the cluster

EnginePatchVersion.description: The Redis OSS engine patch version used by the cluster

ParameterGroupStatus.description: The status of the parameter group used by the cluster, for example 'active' or 'applying'.

TLSEnabled.description: A flag to indicate if In-transit encryption is enabled

KmsKeyId.description: The ID of the KMS key used to encrypt the cluster

SnsTopicArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the SNS notification topic

SnsTopicStatus.description: The SNS topic must be in Active status to receive notifications

SnapshotRetentionLimit.description: The number of days for which MemoryDB retains automatic snapshots before deleting them. For example, if you set SnapshotRetentionLimit to 5, a snapshot that was taken today is retained for 5 days before being deleted.

MaintenanceWindow.description: Specifies the weekly time range during which maintenance on the cluster is performed. It is specified as a range in the format ddd:hh24:mi-ddd:hh24:mi (24H Clock UTC). The minimum maintenance window is a 60 minute period.

SnapshotWindow.description: The daily time range (in UTC) during which MemoryDB begins taking a daily snapshot of your shard. Example: 05:00-09:00 If you do not specify this parameter, MemoryDB automatically chooses an appropriate time range.

ACLName.description: The name of the Access Control List associated with this cluster.

AutoMinorVersionUpgrade.description: When set to true, the cluster will automatically receive minor engine version upgrades after launch.

DataTiering.description: Enables data tiering. Data tiering is only supported for clusters using the r6gd node type. This parameter must be set when using r6gd nodes. For more information, see Data tiering.

NetworkType.description: The IP address type for the cluster. Returns 'ipv4' for IPv4 only, 'ipv6' for IPv6 only, or 'dual-stack' if the cluster supports both IPv4 and IPv6 addressing.

IpDiscovery.description: The mechanism that the cluster uses to discover IP addresses. Returns 'ipv4' when DNS endpoints resolve to IPv4 addresses, or 'ipv6' when DNS endpoints resolve to IPv6 addresses.

NextToken.description: An optional argument to pass in case the total number of records exceeds the value of MaxResults. If nextToken is returned, there are more results available. Source.description: Indicates whether the snapshot is from an automatic backup (automated) or was created manually (manual).

KmsKeyId.description: The ID of the KMS key used to encrypt the snapshot.

ARN.description: The ARN (Amazon Resource Name) of the snapshot.

ClusterConfiguration.description: The configuration of the cluster from which the snapshot was taken

NodeType.description: The node type used for the cluster

Engine.description: The name of the engine used by the cluster configuration.

EngineVersion.description: The Redis OSS engine version used by the cluster

MaintenanceWindow.description: The specified maintenance window for the cluster

TopicArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the SNS notification topic for the cluster

ParameterGroupName.description: The name of parameter group used by the cluster

SubnetGroupName.description: The name of the subnet group used by the cluster

VpcId.description: The ID of the VPC the cluster belongs to

SnapshotRetentionLimit.description: The snapshot retention limit set by the cluster

SnapshotWindow.description: The snapshot window set by the cluster

NumShards.description: The number of shards in the cluster

Shards.description: The list of shards in the cluster

MultiRegionParameterGroupName.description: The name of the multi-Region parameter group associated with the cluster configuration.

MultiRegionClusterName.description: The name for the multi-Region cluster associated with the cluster configuration.

DataTiering.description: Enables data tiering. Data tiering is only supported for clusters using the r6gd node type. This parameter must be set when using r6gd nodes. For more information, see Data tiering.

SubnetGroup.description: The subnet group object that has been deleted.

VpcId.description: The Amazon Virtual Private Cloud identifier (VPC ID) of the subnet group.

Subnets.description: A list of subnets associated with the subnet group.

ARN.description: The ARN (Amazon Resource Name) of the subnet group.

SupportedNetworkTypes.description: The network types supported by this subnet group. Returns an array of strings that can include 'ipv4', 'ipv6', or both, indicating the IP address types that can be used for clusters deployed in this subnet group.

User.description: The user object that has been deleted.

Status.description: Indicates the user status. Can be "active", "modifying" or "deleting".

AccessString.description: Access permissions string used for this user.

ACLNames.description: The names of the Access Control Lists to which the user belongs

MinimumEngineVersion.description: The minimum engine version supported for the user

Authentication.description: Denotes whether the user requires a password to authenticate.

Type.description: Indicates whether the user requires a password to authenticate.

PasswordCount.description: The number of passwords belonging to the user. The maximum is two.

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user.

NextToken.description: An optional token to include in the response. If this token is provided, the response includes only results beyond the token, up to the value specified by MaxResults.

MultiRegionParameters.description: A list of parameters specific to a particular multi-region parameter group. Each element in the list contains detailed information about one parameter.

Source.description: Indicates the source of the parameter value. Valid values: user | system | engine-default

DataType.description: The valid data type for the parameter.

AllowedValues.description: The valid range of values for the parameter.

MinimumEngineVersion.description: The earliest engine version to which the parameter can apply.

NextToken.description: An optional argument to pass in case the total number of records exceeds the value of MaxResults. If nextToken is returned, there are more results available. The value of nextToken is a unique pagination token for each page. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page. Keep all other arguments unchanged.

Parameters.description: A list of parameters specific to a particular parameter group. Each element in the list contains detailed information about one parameter.

AllowedValues.description: The valid range of values for the parameter.

MinimumEngineVersion.description: The earliest engine version to which the parameter can apply.

Name.description: The user-supplied name of the cluster. This identifier is a unique key that identifies a cluster.

Status.description: The status of the cluster. For example, Available, Updating, Creating.

PendingUpdates.description: A group of settings that are currently being applied.

Resharding.description: The status of an online resharding operation.

SlotMigration.description: The status of the online resharding slot migration

ProgressPercentage.description: The percentage of the slot migration that is complete.

ACLs.description: A list of ACLs associated with the cluster that are being updated

ACLToApply.description: A list of ACLs pending to be applied.

ServiceUpdates.description: A list of service updates being applied to the cluster

MultiRegionClusterName.description: The name of the multi-Region cluster that this cluster belongs to.

NumberOfShards.description: The number of shards in the cluster

Shards.description: A list of shards that are members of the cluster.

AvailabilityMode.description: Indicates if the cluster has a Multi-AZ configuration (multiaz) or not (singleaz).

Port.description: The port number that the engine is listening on.

Engine.description: The name of the engine used by the cluster.

EngineVersion.description: The Redis OSS engine version used by the cluster

EnginePatchVersion.description: The Redis OSS engine patch version used by the cluster

ParameterGroupName.description: The name of the parameter group used by the cluster

ParameterGroupStatus.description: The status of the parameter group used by the cluster, for example 'active' or 'applying'.

SecurityGroups.description: A list of security groups used by the cluster

SubnetGroupName.description: The name of the subnet group used by the cluster

TLSEnabled.description: A flag to indicate if In-transit encryption is enabled

KmsKeyId.description: The ID of the KMS key used to encrypt the cluster

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster.

SnsTopicArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the SNS notification topic

SnsTopicStatus.description: The SNS topic must be in Active status to receive notifications

SnapshotRetentionLimit.description: The number of days for which MemoryDB retains automatic snapshots before deleting them. For example, if you set SnapshotRetentionLimit to 5, a snapshot that was taken today is retained for 5 days before being deleted.

MaintenanceWindow.description: Specifies the weekly time range during which maintenance on the cluster is performed. It is specified as a range in the format ddd:hh24:mi-ddd:hh24:mi (24H Clock UTC). The minimum maintenance window is a 60 minute period.

SnapshotWindow.description: The daily time range (in UTC) during which MemoryDB begins taking a daily snapshot of your shard. Example: 05:00-09:00 If you do not specify this parameter, MemoryDB automatically chooses an appropriate time range.

ACLName.description: The name of the Access Control List associated with this cluster.

AutoMinorVersionUpgrade.description: When set to true, the cluster will automatically receive minor engine version upgrades after launch.

DataTiering.description: Enables data tiering. Data tiering is only supported for clusters using the r6gd node type. This parameter must be set when using r6gd nodes. For more information, see Data tiering.

NetworkType.description: The IP address type for the cluster. Returns 'ipv4' for IPv4 only, 'ipv6' for IPv6 only, or 'dual-stack' if the cluster supports both IPv4 and IPv6 addressing.

IpDiscovery.description: The mechanism that the cluster uses to discover IP addresses. Returns 'ipv4' when DNS endpoints resolve to IPv4 addresses, or 'ipv6' when DNS endpoints resolve to IPv6 addresses.

ScaleUpNodeTypes.description: The node types that the cluster can be scaled up to.

ScaleDownNodeTypes.description: The node types that the cluster can be scaled down to.

ScaleUpNodeTypes.description: A list node types which you can use to scale up your cluster.

ScaleDownNodeTypes.description: A list node types which you can use to scale down your cluster.

TagList.description: A list of tags as key-value pairs.

Key.description: The key for the tag. May not be null.

ReservationId.description: A customer-specified identifier to track this reservation.

ReservedNodesOfferingId.description: The ID of the reserved node offering to purchase.

NodeType.description: The node type for the reserved nodes.

Duration.description: The duration of the reservation in seconds.

FixedPrice.description: The fixed price charged for this reserved node.

NodeCount.description: The number of nodes that have been reserved.

OfferingType.description: The offering type of this reserved node.

RecurringCharges.description: The recurring price charged to run this reserved node.

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the reserved node.

Family.description: The name of the parameter group family that this parameter group is compatible with.

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the parameter group

TagList.description: A list of tags as key-value pairs.

Key.description: The key for the tag. May not be null.
The key for the tag. May not be null.

Name.description: The name of the Access Control List

Status.description: Indicates ACL status. Can be "creating", "active", "modifying", "deleting".

UserNames.description: The list of user names that belong to the ACL.

MinimumEngineVersion.description: The minimum engine version supported for the ACL

PendingChanges.description: A list of updates being applied to the ACL.

UserNamesToRemove.description: A list of user names being removed from the ACL

UserNamesToAdd.description: A list of users being added to the ACL

Clusters.description: A list of clusters associated with the ACL.

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ACL
